github.label: GitHub focus
github.plan_line: GitHub for issues, pull requests, commits, and code search.
github.base_notes: Search issues, pull requests, commits, and code via the GitHub MCP server (read-only filter). Strong fit for engineering root-cause: when a regression landed, which PR or commit touched a path, and who owns an area. Read-only — never open, edit, comment on, or merge issues or PRs.
